Portfolio Metrics (Perf Tracker + CRM)

CPTD = Spend ÷ Trial Dones CPQL = Spend ÷ Qualified Leads QL→TD% = Trial Done ÷ QL Below target Watch zone Over threshold
Level:
Creative Insight Spend QL TD CPTQL CPTD Tags

Tag x Performance Heatmap

Tag and pull creative data first. The heatmap shows average CPTD and CPTQL for each tag value — green = cheaper than average, red = more expensive.

Tag Performance Insights

Best and worst tag values per category, by CPTD across all tagged creatives in the current filter.

Proven Tag Combos

Which tag pairs produce the cheapest trials? Based on median CPTD across all creatives sharing the same two tags. "Use More" = found in top performers, "Avoid" = found in bottom performers.

Needs tagged creatives with performance data. Shows which tag pairs (e.g. Testimonial + NRI) appear in top performers but not bottom ones.

Creative Leaderboard

Load data to see campaigns ranked by performance.

Settings

Data sources & API keys

Data QA Validation

Compares computed CRM numbers against known ground truth (DATA_LOGIC_OVERRIDE). Run after data loads.

Click "Run QA" after data loads to validate numbers.

Reset Tagger Data (if spend is inflated)

Clears in-memory tagger data. Tags in Supabase are preserved. Reload page to re-hydrate.

Data Source

One Google Sheet with leads and cost tabs. Sheet must be shared as "Anyone with the link can view".

Cost data available from November 2025. Metrics before this date will show spend as —

Library Sheet

Google Sheet with your creative assets. Supports multiple tabs (Video, Static, Testimonial). Uses Google Sheets API (same key as Data Source).

Meta Ads API

Not connected

Connect to Meta Marketing API to pull ad performance data automatically. Token is valid for 60 days.

Token is configured on the server (Netlify env var). No need to enter it here — all team members share the same connection.

Full History Backfill (run once)

Fetches ad spend from Nov 2025 → today in monthly chunks. Required for accurate CPTQL on historical campaigns. Takes ~2 min. Only needed once — daily sync handles updates after.

API Keys

Keys are stored in your browser's localStorage. They are sent directly to each API provider (Anthropic, Google, Supabase) when making requests — never to any other server.

Powers creative tagging, AI analysis, and copy generation. Get yours at console.anthropic.com

Keys are saved to localStorage. Clear browser data to remove them.

Meta Ads Creative CSV

Campaign, ad, creative type, funnel metrics

Metric Glossary

All metrics use: Spend from Perf Tracker Daily, Funnel from CRM. CPTD is the PRIMARY success metric.

MetricDefinitionBenchmark
QLQualified Lead — passed initial quality filters from Meta—
TQLTrue Qualified Lead — US: NRI only, India: IB/IGCSE boards, MEA: intl boards, APAC/UK: all QLs—
NRINon-Resident Indian leads — highest converting segment (19.4% enrollment rate)—
TSTrial Scheduled — lead has booked a demo class—
TDTrial Done — lead completed a demo class—
CPQLCost Per QL = Spend / QL (leading indicator)US < ₹10K > ₹15K · India <₹500/₹800
CPTQLCost Per TQL = Spend / TQLUS < ₹15K > ₹20K · India <₹800/₹1.2K
CPTDCost Per Trial Done = Spend / TD — PRIMARY metricUS < ₹35K > ₹50K · India <₹3K/₹5K · AUS <₹30K/₹45K · MEA <₹25K/₹35K
CACCustomer Acquisition Cost = Spend / Enrolled< ₹1.5L > ₹2L
CTRClick-Through Rate = Clicks / ImpressionsVaries by format
QL→TD%Lead-to-Trial conversion = TD / QL> 30%
T2P%Trial-to-Paid conversion = Enrolled / TD> 25%

Data Sources

Spend: Perf Tracker Daily (Google Sheets) — daily rows by campaign/geo, filtered by date range

Funnel (QL→TD→Enrolled): CRM Leads sheet — per-lead data with date-specific filtering (QL by lead_created_date, TD by trial_done_date)

Creative-level: Tagger data (Meta Ads sheet or API) — per-ad metrics, merged with CRM for TD/Paid attribution

Welcome to Godfather

Cuemath's Marketing Command Center. Every metric, creative, and recommendation — in one place.

O

Start with Oracle

Oracle shows what to do right now — which ads to pause, which audiences to scale, and market health at a glance.

Data auto-loads from Google Sheets. Use the filter bar at the top to change date range and geography.

Explore the Views

Lens: Tag — organize and tag your creatives from Meta

Lens: Intel — discover what's working and why

Sentinel — score and rank every ad in your portfolio

Influencer — track creator performance

Forge — generate new copy and visuals

?

Need Help?

Click the purple ? button (bottom-right) anytime to see the metric glossary. Hover any table header for definitions.

CPTD (Cost Per Trial Done) is the PRIMARY metric. When in doubt, optimize for lower CPTD.
